title: RPG Equipment Durability
description: Provide durability display for certain RPG plugins
body:
This mod provides durability display for certain RPG equipment plugins.

This mod supports equipments provided by the following plugins:
- MMOItems

This mod supports providing RPG equipment durability to the following mods:
- Giselbaer's Durability Viewer
- InventoryHUD+ (only Percentage mode)
